questions.question: The Sarkaria Commission primarily focussed on strengthening which type of federalism in India?
Who acts as the real executive head in a state?
Which of the following acts was aimed at establishing a federal polity in India?
The Rajya Sabha seat distribution among states is found in which Schedule of the Indian Constitution?
Which Article allows the President to appoint a Commission to investigate the condition of socially and educationally backward classes?
Provision for securing just and humane conditions of work and maternity relief comes under which Article of the Indian Constitution?
What was one recommendation of the Sarkaria Commission regarding Governors?
questions.option_4: Governors should be elected by States.

questions.question: Which amendment abolished the privy purse and privileges of the former rulers of princely states?
Which of the following is a non-statutory and non-constitutional body?
Which of the following digital initiatives aims to make the legislative proceedings of State and Union Territory Legislatures in India completely paperless?
Which of the following is a distinct feature of a statutory corporation in India?
questions.option_1: It is created by a special Act, has independent legal status and can sue/be sued.
questions.option_2: It is fully owned by private shareholders and receives no government funding.
questions.option_3: It has no legal existence separate from the government.
questions.option_4: Its employees are considered government civil servants under the usual rules.

questions.question: In which case did the SC hold that judicial review is a basic feature of the Constitution?
Which of the following states are covered under the Fifth Schedule of the Indian Constitution?
Who has the authority to transfer judges of the High Courts in India?
questions.option_1: Chief Justice of India acting on behalf of the Supreme Court

questions.question: Which of the following constitutional bodies was created to recommend appointments and transfers of judges in India?
Which of the following statements about the Council of Ministers is correct?
questions.option_1: All members of the Council of Ministers are part of the Cabinet.
questions.option_2: Ministers of State rank higher than Cabinet Ministers.
questions.option_3: The Council of Ministers is appointed by the Chief Justice.
questions.option_4: Cabinet Ministers are a smaller group within the Council of Ministers.

questions.question: The provision of early childhood care and education to children below six years of age was introduced by which Constitutional Amendment?
The RTI Act applies to which of the followings in India?
Which of the following falls under the Supreme Court’s original jurisdiction, according to the Constitution of India (Article 131)?
questions.option_1: Enforcement of fundamental rights of individuals
questions.option_2: Appeals from criminal cases in High Courts
questions.option_3: Disputes between States or between a State and the Union
questions.option_4: Election petitions against sitting Members of Parliaments

questions.question: When was the States Reorganisation Act passed, implementing the Commission’s recommendations?
Which Article of the Indian Constitution provides for the Council of Ministers at the Union level?
Which of the following is true regarding the tenure and independence of the Chief Election Commissioner (CEC) of India?
questions.option_1: The CEC can only be removed like a Supreme Court judge by a two-thirds majority in Parliament.
questions.option_2: The other Election Commissioners can only be removed by the CEC, not by the government.
questions.option_3: The CEC’s removal requires assent of the Chief Justice of India but not necessarily the Parliament’s approval.
questions.option_4: The CEC enjoys a fixed tenure of ten years and cannot be replaced before that term under any circumstances.

questions.question: In which year was the Indian Civil Service (ICS) officially replaced by the Indian Administrative Service (IAS)?
Which of the following Amendments made Education a subject in the Concurrent List?
What is the name of the Act that governs the rules and service conditions of All-India Services?
